class.name: FmodAudioEffectEQ10
class.description: FmodAudioEffectEQ10 is a 10-band graphic equalizer using FMOD's MULTIBAND_EQ DSP. It provides frequency equalization across ten bands spanning from 31Hz to 16000Hz, suitable for detailed audio shaping. Each band can be individually adjusted for gain (-60 dB to +24 dB), frequency, Q value, and filter type. By default, all bands use peaking filters with a Q value of 0.707. The frequency bands are: 31Hz, 62Hz, 125Hz, 250Hz, 500Hz, 1000Hz, 2000Hz, 4000Hz, 8000Hz, and 16000Hz. [b]Note:[/b] For simpler control, use [FmodAudioEffectEQ6]. For professional-grade equalization, use [FmodAudioEffectEQ21].

members.member: The preset is fixed to [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.PRESET_10_BANDS] for this class.
Gain for the first band (31Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the first band in Hz.
Q value for the first band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the first band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the second band (62Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the second band in Hz.
Q value for the second band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the second band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the third band (125Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the third band in Hz.
Q value for the third band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the third band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the fourth band (250Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the fourth band in Hz.
Q value for the fourth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the fourth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the fifth band (500Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the fifth band in Hz.
Q value for the fifth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the fifth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the sixth band (1000Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the sixth band in Hz.
Q value for the sixth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the sixth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the seventh band (2000Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the seventh band in Hz.
Q value for the seventh band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the seventh band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the eighth band (4000Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the eighth band in Hz.
Q value for the eighth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the eighth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the ninth band (8000Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the ninth band in Hz.
Q value for the ninth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the ninth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
Gain for the tenth band (16000Hz) in decibels. Range: -60 to +24 dB.
Center frequency for the tenth band in Hz.
Q value for the tenth band. Range: 0.01 to 10.0.
Filter type for the tenth band. Default is [constant FmodAudioEffectEQ.FILTER_PEAKING].
